title: Health Care Providers Safety Act of 2025
short_title: Health Care Providers Safety Act of 2025
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
crs_summary: Health Care Providers Safety Act of 2025 This bill authorizes the Department of Health and Human Services to award grants to health care providers for security services and other expenses related to physical security and cybersecurity.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
